{{/* Right-side "On this page": the type, then Example / Spec / Status (one level of their object fields), then Embedded objects (each type, one level of its fields) — via apiBuilder/tocFields. Mirrors toc.html markup for the mobile dropdown and scrollspy (data-bs-spy targets #TableOfContents). */}} On this page
{{ $plural := .Params.plural }} {{ $crd := "" }} {{ with index site.Data.apis.crds $plural }}{{ $crd = .definition }}{{ end }} {{ $hasExample := resources.Get (printf "examples/reference/%s.yaml" $plural) }} {{ with $crd }} {{ $kind := .spec.names.kind }} {{ range $v := .spec.versions }}{{ if $v.served }} {{ $schema := $v.schema.openAPIV3Schema }} {{ $specSchema := index $schema.properties "spec" }} {{ $statusSchema := index $schema.properties "status" }} {{ $types := newScratch }} {{ with $specSchema }}{{ partial "apiBuilder/collectTypes" (dict "props" .properties "path" "spec" "kind" $kind "scratch" $types) }}{{ end }} {{ with $statusSchema }}{{ partial "apiBuilder/collectTypes" (dict "props" .properties "path" "status" "kind" $kind "scratch" $types) }}{{ end }}
    {{/* The CRD itself, with its subsections nested under it. */}}
  • {{ $.Title }}
    • Metadata
      • {{ with $hasExample }}
    • Example
      • {{ end }} {{ with $specSchema }}
    • Spec
        {{ partial "apiBuilder/tocFields" (dict "props" .properties "path" "spec" "kind" $kind) }}
      • {{ end }} {{ with $statusSchema }}{{ if .properties }}
    • Status
        {{ partial "apiBuilder/tocFields" (dict "props" .properties "path" "status" "kind" $kind) }}
      • {{ end }}{{ end }} {{ with $v.subresources }}
    • Subresources
      • {{ end }}
    • {{/* Embedded objects: peers of the CRD, each with its own fields. */}} {{ range $name := $types.Get "order" }} {{ $node := index ($types.Get "nodes") $name }}
  • {{ $name }}
      {{ partial "apiBuilder/tocFields" (dict "props" $node.props "path" $node.path "kind" $kind) }}
    • {{ end }}
{{ end }}{{ end }} {{ end }}
